name: PT Alfa Energi Investama Tbk
summary: PT Alfa Energi Investama Tbk, through its subsidiaries, engages in the coal mining and trading business in Indonesia. The company holds interests in a concession with approximately 2,089 hectares located in Kutai Kartanegara, East Kalimantan; and a concession with approximately 6,000 hectares located in West Kutai, East Kalimantan. It also provides coal mining management services. The company was founded in 2015 and is based in South Jakarta, Indonesia.
